findings.title: Polkadot transactions claim contradiction
findings.detail: Found both sides of claim. Example positive: spec.md:127:- ✅ Real Polkadot transactions (DOT transfers via `balances.transferKeepAlive`) | Example negative: spec.md:444:- [ ] Real Polkadot transactions not implemented (UI only)

findings.title: Production-ready claim vs unfinished markers
findings.detail: Found both sides of claim. Example positive: spec.md:5:**Status:** Production Ready 🚀   | Example negative: src/DESIGN_TOKENS.md:28:| `--muted` | `#8E8E93` | Tertiary text (timestamps, hints, placeholders) |

findings.title: Monthly burn analysis
findings.detail: Amount: 45,000.00 USDT over 3 months = 15,000.00 USDT/month. Conservative monthly burn for early-stage treasury request.
